description_long: This is a rustic, round loaf of bread with a thick, golden-brown crust and a dusting of flour on its surface. The crust appears uneven and rugged, with some lighter patches and a few cracks, giving it a handmade, artisanal look. The cut face reveals a soft, airy interior with irregular holes, typical of sourdough or country-style bread. The loaf is unsliced and has a domed shape, with the crust showing a mottled pattern of light and dark brown tones. There are no visible seeds or toppings, and the bread looks hearty and substantial. The overall appearance suggests it is freshly baked and suitable for display in a bakery or urban market setting.
description: A rustic, round loaf of bread with a thick, golden-brown crust and a flour-dusted, airy interior. The surface is rugged and mottled, giving it an artisanal appearance.
description_view_0: The cut face of the bread is visible, showing a soft, airy interior with irregular holes and a thick, flour-dusted crust.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the rounded, domed crust with a rugged, uneven surface and mottled brown coloration.
description_view_2: The back of the loaf is shown, featuring a smooth, rounded crust with lighter and darker brown patches and no visible cut face.
description_view_3: Another side view, displaying the loaf's domed shape and the rough, rustic texture of the crust with subtle color variations.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a rugged, uneven pattern with a mottled mix of golden-brown and lighter flour-dusted patches. There are no visible scores or seeds, and the surface appears rustic and handmade.
